title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Fine Motion...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wow! Ahaha! ♪ There are so many plushies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it a shot! Today's the day! I'm going to
get one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well... I'm actually not very good at claw
machines. In fact, I've never been able to win a
single thing...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I don't win anything today either, then I intend
to acquire every machine here for practice!
choice_data_list:
Would you like me to just show you how it's
done?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? Would you really? I'd be much obliged!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
